feed.subtitle: GenAI & Agentic AI Engineer. Building RAG systems, agents, and AI infrastructure that works in production.

entry.title: Stop Optimizing for MSE: Why Your Business Metrics Matter More Than Your Loss Function

link.title: Stop Optimizing for MSE: Why Your Business Metrics Matter More Than Your Loss Function

entry.summary: As developers, we are trained to worship the leaderboards. We see a lower Mean Squared Error (MSE) or a higher R-squared, and we think we’ve won. But after half a decade in the industry—transitionin...

entry.title: The Silent Killer of AI Projects: How to Spot Data Leakage Before It Kills Your Production Code

link.title: The Silent Killer of AI Projects: How to Spot Data Leakage Before It Kills Your Production Code

entry.summary: We’ve all been there. You’ve spent weeks cleaning data, engineering features, and tuning your model. You hit "Run," and the results are breathtaking: 99.8% accuracy. You celebrate. You might even st...
